title: eriophorum cyperinum var. condensatum
intro: Eriophorum cyperinum var. condensatum, also known as the cotton grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Eriophorum cyperinum var. condensatum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
